Title: Safety Light Curtain — 23mm Hand Detection, 300mm Protected Height
Body (HTML):
Type 4 / Category 4 light curtain — hand-detection resolution.

Compact 300mm protected height for smaller danger zones — robotic cells, packaging machines, presses with narrow access windows.

Specifications

  • Resolution: 23mm — detects hands and larger
  • Protected height: 300mm
  • Safety category: Type 4 / PLe / SIL 3
  • Operating range: Up to 12m (40 ft)
  • Response time: ≤20 ms
  • Housing: Aluminum, IP65/IP67
  • Compliance: ANSI B11.19, OSHA 1910.212, ISO 13849-1 PLe
  • Brand: Banner Engineering, OMRON/STI, or equivalent (we'll source the best fit for your application)

Sizing the right light curtain matters. The protected height should be selected based on the danger zone and ANSI B11 / OSHA safety-distance calculations. Call us at (281) 265-2832 before ordering if you're unsure — we'll size it right the first time.

Mounting brackets and cables sold separately. Mirror accessories available for L-shaped or U-shaped protection — contact us.

Title: Pressure-Sensitive Safety Mat — 24" × 24"
Body (HTML):
Pressure-sensitive safety mat — fixed published sizing.

Detects operator presence in the danger zone. Pressure on the mat surface triggers an immediate machine stop signal. Used for robot cell perimeters, press operator stations, conveyor in/feed zones, and machine access points.

Specifications

  • Active area: 24" × 24"
  • Activation force: ~70 lbs (typical adult step)
  • Operating voltage: 24 VDC (via zone controller)
  • Cable: 20-ft 4-wire cord included
  • Surface: Slip-resistant, oil/coolant-resistant compound
  • Edging: Standard yellow ramp edges (4 sides)
  • Compliance: ANSI B11.19, OSHA 1910.212, ISO 13856-1

Required accessories

Requires a safety mat zone controller for use. Single-mat controllers and multi-zone controllers (1-4 and 1-8 mat) available — contact us to bundle with your order. Junction boxes also available for installations of 2-10 mats.

Custom sizes available on request — we publish these 12 as our stocked sizes for fast fulfillment.
Tags: Safety Mats, SM-24x24, Ferndale, Pressure Mat
SEO Description: 24" × 24" pressure-sensitive safety mat for robot cells, presses, and access points. ANSI B11.19 / ISO 13856-1 compliant. Stocked size, ships from Guardomation.

Title: Octagonal Die Safety Block
Body (HTML):
Die safety block — keeps the ram from descending during tool change.

Eight-sided die safety block that fits between the ram and bed of a press brake or stamping press during tool change. Eight stable resting positions provide flexibility for various tool stack heights. 6" diameter.

Specifications

  • Type: Octagonal / eight-position
  • Diameter: 6 inches
  • Material: Hardened steel
  • Finish: Safety yellow powder coat
  • Compliance: ANSI B11.3, OSHA 1910.217

Why use a die safety block? OSHA 1910.217 requires positive means of preventing accidental press cycling during die setup, tool change, or maintenance — die safety blocks satisfy this requirement. Always insert the block before reaching into the point of operation.
Tags: Die Safety Blocks, DSB-OCT-6, Safety Block, Press Brake
SEO Description: Octagonal Die Safety Block — hardened steel die safety block for press brakes and stamping presses. ANSI B11.3 / OSHA 1910.217 compliant. From Guardomation.
